courseTitle: Game Systems, Loops, and Player Experience
title: Movement Verb Game
genericDescription: Make movement itself the primary mechanic; shape challenge through spatial affordances; tune acceleration, friction, jump, dash, glide, or equivalent properties.
specificDescription: Build a game with one distinctive movement verb and five short challenge rooms. The game must be completable without combat, inventory, or score as the main attraction.
gradingRubric: 35 pts movement feel and consistency; 20 pts level use of the verb; 15 pts readable hazards and goals; 15 pts completion polish; 15 pts iteration evidence.
